name: Stone Tomb
descs:
Allies gain 1.5x [Breath] Potency from Skill effects.

When an ally defeats an enemy with a Sloth Affinity Skill, they gain 2 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count at the next Turn Start. (Once per turn)

Allies gain 1.5x [Breath] Potency from Skill effects.

When an ally defeats an enemy, they gain 3 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count at the next Turn Start. (Once per turn)

Allies gain 2x [Breath] Potency from Skill effects.

When an ally defeats an enemy, they gain 4 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count at the next Turn Start. (Once per turn)
